name: Hot Fruit Compote
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425°F.
Place plums and peach halves in alternate layers in a quart baking dish.
Drain mandarin oranges; save the liquid. Arrange the oranges over the fruits in the baking dish.
Mix the orange liquid, brown sugar, lemon rind, and fat together.
Pour the mixture over the fruits.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the fruit is heated through.
